title: Swap memory management — What's next
text:
To learn about managing swap on Linux nodes, read
configuring swap memory on Kubernetes nodes
.
You can check out a
blog post about Kubernetes and swap
For background information, please see the original KEP,
KEP-2400
,
and its
design
.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
